title: Klein 4 Harmonics FAIL: demonstrates a broken group table and a wrong F value
_fixture_purpose: Negative fixture (added 2026-07-06 to close a fixture-coverage gap -- this family previously had zero FAIL fixtures). Plants two independent, deterministically detectable violations: (1) group_table[1][2] declares 0 (identity) instead of the correct I1*I2=I3=3, breaking closure/associativity of K4=Z2xZ2; (2) witness (2,1) declares F=99 instead of the correct F=d*d-e*e=3, which also breaks the Pythagorean invariant F^2+C^2=G^2 (99^2+16=9817 != 25).

witnesses.check: deliberately wrong: F should be d*d-e*e=3, not 99
correct witness, included so the fixture isn't trivially all-wrong

fail_ledger.message: witness (2,1) declared F=99, expected d*d-e*e=3; also breaks F²+C²=G²
